scripts.build: cargo build --workspace && npm run build:sdk-package && npm run test:node
scripts.deploy:lab: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=integration node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs
scripts.deploy:paseo: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=paseo node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs
scripts.deploy:integration: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=integration node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs
scripts.deploy:mainnet: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=mainnet node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:solidity && npm run test:node && npm run test:package
